# Build Your Expertise

Iterable is committed to growing your marketing and Iterable expertise. We understand people learn  
in different ways, below are a few options for you!

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/support-icon5.svg)

### Documentation

Learn how to manage your Iterable account,  
send messages, run experiments, set up mobile  
apps, integrate 3rd-party tools, open a support case, and more.

Explore

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/support-icon4.svg)

### The Iterable Community

Gain access to thousands of marketers just like you—share best practices, learn how to take advantage of new products, and hear from industry experts.

Login

### Academy

Access video-based training courses to learn how to use Iterable. Become an expert in no-time.
